case_title: KENNY S. LIM et al VS. CARMEL RAFAEL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN FILED BY LIM, KENNY S. UYEDA, MICHAEL E. RAFAEL, CARMEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER AND GRANTED. FILED BY DEFENDANT RAFAEL, CARMEL
